author: .paulharris
content:
We had placed limitations on entry queue a while ago due to the constantly increasing demand, and a potential issue with the state growing for ever, so restricting the entry queue was in part to make sure the state can't grow too quickly. 
Also was a driver for maxEB, but unfortunately maxEB is largely not used still and we still have a huge changeover of validator keys.
Fragmentation of the validator set is something like 50%, so i think before we were to address the entry queue rate, we'd have to revisit what the key reasons that we restricted that are, and implement some of the potential solutions to the validator set fragmentation / size.
validator set is a source of pain in epoch transition etc, so theres not really 'easy' unlocks that im aware of currently, and certainly any changes in that area would need to be well thought out.
